title: Sponsorship agreement holders - Canada.ca
content:
## Sponsorship agreement holders
If you’re an established organization that wants to help refugees resettle in Canada, you can apply to be a sponsorship agreement holder (SAH).
SAHs support refugees on their own or with help from other groups and individuals.
If you’re in Quebec, you need to go through a different process to sponsor refugees .
Sponsor as an existing SAH
Apply to become a SAH
There won’t be a 2026 application intake.
We’ll post updates about future intakes when available.
Contact an existing SAH if you want to help sponsor refugees .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
